news.news: Got invitation to perticipate in the 4th Annual CyberTractor Challenge in Ames, Iowa on the campus of Iowa State University, June 15-20, 2025!
Became winner of the poster presentation at Harnessing Data Science and AI for Collaborative Advances in Production Agriculture at Auburn University.

Presented poster titled KBTrack: Long Term Tracking for Plant Counting with Cloud-Enabled Plant Segmentation Framework for Ornamental Nursery Inventory Management at the Harnessing Data Science and AI for Collaborative Advances in Production Agriculture at Auburn University.
Presented at the AI in Agriculture and Natural Resources Conference at Mississippi State University.
Presented at the Auburn Research Symposium 2025 at Auburn University, AL, USA.

Abstract titled Cloud-Enabled Plant Segmentation and Tracking Framework for Ornamental Nursery Inventory Management accepted for oral presentation at Annual International Meeting of ASABE at Sheraton Center Toronto Hotel, Toronto, Ontario, Canada.

Abstract titled Cloud-Enabled Plant Segmentation and Tracking Framework for Ornamental Nursery Inventory Management accepted for oral presentation at AI in Agriculture and Natural Resources Conference at Mississippi State University.
Received GSC Travel Fellowship of $400 for presenting work in AI in Agriculture and Natural Resources Conference at Mississippi State University from Graduate Student Council, Auburn University.
Got Excellency in Productivity ($5,000) award in FIRA USA Farm Robotics Challenge 2025.
Joined Auburn University as a Graduate Research Assistant in the Precision Agriculture Lab.
Started MS in Biosystems Engineering at Auburn University, AL, USA.
Graduated with First Class from Islamic University of Technology with a BSc degree in Software Engineering.
Undergraduate thesis titled An Efficient Deep Learning-based approach for Recognizing Agricultural Pests in the Wild defended.
Joined Intelligent Machines Limited as an Analytics Engineer.
IUT Mars Rover team gained 10th position globally in European Mars Rover Challenge 2021.
Became Second Runner Up (BDT 10,000) in Hackathon at 10th ICT Fest, IUT.
Received India Bangladesh Maitree Muktijoddha Sontan Scholarship of BDT 50,000 from Indian High Commission and Ministry of Liberation War Affairs, Bangladesh.
Started BSc in Software Engineering at Islamic University of Technology, Gazipur, Bangladesh.
